chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1430 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.6048/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For orders on CMA No.6049/2023 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case 05.10.2023 Mr. Muhammad Shakeel Lakho, Advocate for petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2 to 4. Learned Counsel for petitioner does not press this petition with permission to file a fresh one. Order accordingly. The petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
